name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, containing fillable fields for party details and key terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement covering SaaS and cloud service subscriptions between providers and customers.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Service Level Agreement defining uptime targets, response times, and service credit remedies.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early product access and feedback partnerships.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for consulting, implementation, and custom development engagements.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Data Processing Agreement for GDPR and data protection compliance when processing personal data.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for co-marketing, referral, and strategic partnership arrangements.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or installable software licensing.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for trial and evaluation access to products before committing to a full subscription.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement for HIPAA compliance when handling protected health information.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum covering AI service usage, model training restrictions, and intellectual property for AI-generated output.
